narrative:
Monterey Twp (precinct in Putnam County) has 798 registered voters, with 51.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.4 percentage points.
